title: centaurium umbellatum var. broteri
intro: Centaurium umbellatum var. broteri, also known as Broteri's centaury, is a variety of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of centaurium umbellatum var. broteri include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
